note: Stage 2 starts only after protocol_sweep_summary and failure_taxonomy are reviewed.

specs.name: g0_current_generator_baseline
specs.purpose: Baseline PTB synthetic generator; no BUT-style protocol changes.
specs.expected_value: Separates protocol effects from generator effects.

specs.name: g1_but_snr_table1
specs.purpose: Good 16-18dB, medium 5-14dB, bad <= -3dB using BUT-like severity bands.
specs.expected_value: Tests whether logit mismatch is mostly SNR calibration.

specs.name: g2_good_lenient
specs.purpose: Good can include mild noise if P/QRS/T remain clear.
specs.expected_value: Reduces over-rejection of BUT good under real wearable noise.

specs.name: g3_medium_partial_local
specs.purpose: QRS detectable but P/T/ST local details unreliable.
specs.expected_value: Targets BUT class-2 expert definition instead of middle SNR only.

specs.name: g4_bad_qrs_unreliable
specs.purpose: Bad has unreliable QRS: missing/spurious peaks, attenuation, broadening.
specs.expected_value: Directly attacks current bad false negatives.

specs.name: g5_bad_contact_loss
specs.purpose: Adds flatline, clipping, contact loss, baseline step and dropout.
specs.expected_value: Models BUT free-living wearable failures absent in PTB synthetic.

specs.name: g6_cinc_noisy_bad
specs.expected_value: Keeps CinC-style too-noisy rejection aligned with BUT bad.

specs.name: g7_mixed_but_style
specs.purpose: Mixture of G2-G6 with PTB balanced split preserved.
specs.expected_value: Candidate for full Uformer training after head-only validation.
